texto: As I listened I felt a dull numbness, like the effect of chloroform, rather than the primal, anarchic agony you usually feel when you encounter someone you have loved now turned to dust, in some object like a little bowl, and you are required to believe that it is still the same person who once smiled at you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Magda Szabó: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “As I listened I felt a dull numbness, like the effect of chloroform, rather than the primal, anar…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, death-and-dying, loss pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e loss.
